meaning: n.[气]佐达风(指自安第斯山脉吹越阿根廷草原的干热多尘北风)
examples: Sources say this one, spotted on its way to this year's Le Mans 24 hour, is built on the Zonda F chassis.
The Zonda looks like what it is, a domesticated Le Mans prototype, a hard-eyed courtesan in a carbon-fiber corset laced with an assassin's piano wire.
